zh.lifeSummary: 當Valentine Browne於1572年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克霍斯皮塔爾時，他的父親Nicholas Browne22歲，母親Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare23歲。他於1597年與Ellice Fitzgerald在愛爾蘭庫迪 本 馮 克羅斯 本 迪拉利結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1633年9月13日在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里吉拉尼享年61歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 克里吉拉尼。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Valentine Browne于1572年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克霍斯皮塔爾时，他的父亲Nicholas Browne22岁，母亲Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare23岁。他于1597年与Ellice Fitzgerald在爱尔兰庫迪 本 馮 克羅斯 本 迪拉利结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1633年9月13日在爱尔兰庫迪 克里吉拉尼享年61岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 克里吉拉尼。

nameMeanings.name: Browne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably also an Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Braune   or   Braun  .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

variants.name: Brown
meanings: English, Scottish, and Irish: generally a nickname referring to the color of the hair or complexion, Middle English br(o)un, from Old English brūn or Old French brun. This word is occasionally found in Old French, Middle English and Old Norse as a personal name or byname (Middle English personal name Brun, Broun, ancient Germanic Bruno, Old English Brūn, or possibly Old Norse Brúnn or Brúni). Brun- was also an ancient Germanic name-forming element. Some instances of Old English Brūn as a personal name may therefore be short forms of compound names such as Brūngar, Brūnwine, etc. As a Scottish and Irish name, it sometimes represents a translation of Gaelic Donn (see below). Brown (including in the senses below) is the fourth most frequent surname in the US. It is also very common among African Americans and Native Americans (see also 5 below).
Irish and Scottish: adopted for Ó Duinn (see Dunn ) or for any of the many Irish and Scottish Gaelic names containing the element donn ‘brown-haired’ (also meaning ‘chieftain’), for example Donahue .
Irish: phonetic Anglicization of Mac an Bhreitheamhnaigh; see Breheny .

nameMeanings.name: Valentine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the Latin name Valentinus, a derivative of valens ‘healthy, strong’. This was the name of a Roman martyr of the 3rd century, whose feast is celebrated on 14 February . This was the date of a pagan fertility festival marking the first stirrings of spring, which has survived in an attenuated form under the patronage of the saint.

historicEvents.description: Accession of James I. Surrender of Hugh O'Neill. Enforcement of English Law in Ireland.

en.lifeSummary: When Valentine Browne was born in 1572, in Hospital, County Limerick, Ireland, his father, Nicholas Browne, was 22 and his mother, Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare, was 23. He married Ellice Fitzgerald in 1597, in County of the Cross of Tipperary, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 4 daughters. He died on 13 September 1633, in Killarney, County Kerry, Ireland, at the age of 61, and was buried in Killarney, County Kerry, Ireland.

fr.County Tipperary, Ireland: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Valentine Browne est né en 1572, à Hospital, County Limerick, Irlande, son père, Nicholas Browne, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ellice Fitzgerald en 1597, à County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1633, à Killarney, County Kerry, Irlande, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterré à Killarney, County Kerry, Irlande.

de.County Tipperary, Ireland: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland
de.lifeSummary: Als Valentine Browne 1572 in Hospital, County Limerick, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Browne 22 und seine Mutter Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare 23. Er hat 1597 in County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irland Ellice Fitzgerald geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er starb am 13. September 1633 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Killarney, County Kerry, Irland und wurde in Killarney, County Kerry, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Valentine Browne è nato il nel 1572 nel Hospital, County Limerick, Irlanda, il suo padre, Nicholas Browne, aveva 22 anni e il suo madre, Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ellice Fitzgerald nel 1597, nel County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 13 settembre 1633, nel Killarney, County Kerry, Irlanda, all'età di 61 anni, e fu sepolto a Killarney, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Valentine Browneが1572年にアイルランドコウントイ リメリックホースパタルで生まれた時，父Nicholas Browneは22歳，母Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beareは23歳であった。1597年にアイルランドコウントイ オフ ス クロス オフ ティップエラリーでEllice Fitzgeraldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1633年9月13日にアイルランドコウントイ ケリーキラーニーで61歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ ケリーキラーニーにて埋葬された。

ko.County Tipperary, Ireland: 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리
ko.lifeSummary: Valentine Browne(이)가 1572년 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 호스피탤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Browne(은)는 22세였고, 그의 어머니 Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1597년 아일랜드 카운티 프 테 크로스 프 티페라리에서 Ellice Fitzgerald(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1633년 9월 13일 아일랜드 카운티 케리 킬라른이에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 케리 킬라른이에 묻혔다.

pt.County Tipperary, Ireland: County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Valentine Browne nasceu em 1572, em Hospital, County Limerick, Irlanda, seu pai, Nicholas Browne, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellice Fitzgerald em 1597, em County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1633, em Killarney, County Kerry, Irlanda, com 61 anos, e foi sepultado em Killarney, County Kerry, Irlanda.

ru.County Tipperary, Ireland: коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Valentine Browne родился в 1572 г. в местности хоспиталь, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Nicholas Browne было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Sheila Julia O'Sullivan Beare, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellice Fitzgerald в 1597 г. в местности коунти оф т кросс оф типпирэри, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 4 дочери. Он умер 13 сентября 1633 г. в местности килларни, коунти кирри, Ирландия в возрасте 61 год и был похоронен в местности килларни, коунти кирри, Ирландия.

Se casó con Ellice Fitzgerald en 1597, en County of the Cross of Tipperary, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1633, en Killarney, County Kerry, Irlanda, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultado en Killarney, County Kerry, Irlanda.
